alkylation reagent: mixed with 50 mM IAA (100 μL) in UA buffer
alkylation concentration: mixed with 50 mM IAA (100 μL) in UA buffer
cleavage agent: diluted to 40 µL of 25 mM NH4HCO3 containing 2 µg of Trypsin
instrument: acquired on a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 5 L lysis buffer (100 mM Tris-HCl, pH 7.7, 300 mM NaCl, 10% glycerol, 2 mM DTT, 0.1 mM PMSF, and protease inhibitor cocktail)
reduction concentration: 5 L lysis buffer (100 mM Tris-HCl, pH 7.7, 300 mM NaCl, 10% glycerol, 2 mM DTT, 0.1 mM PMSF, and protease inhibitor cocktail)
